productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Kids Girls Navy Blue Dress
description: Composition Navy blue sleeveless frock made of 100% cotton, has polyester frills, round neck, bow detail at the neckline, and a ruffled skirt Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours in a delicate cycle Do not bleach Tumble dry low or lay flat to dry Warm iron when needed Do not iron on print The cute statement simply zooms high when you dress your little girl in this frock from united colors of benetton. Team this with lacy shoes and make her look like the fairy that she is.
